F&I Sentinel Named to Inc. 5000 List of Fastest-Growing Private Companies in America for Third Straight Year F&I Sentinel, the leader in tech-enabled solutions for finance and insurance products (F&I) to the automotive finance industry, is proud to announce its inclusion on the esteemed Inc. 5000 list of fastest-growing companies for the third straight year. F&I Sentinel ranked #1,931 on the 2025 list and #117 in the financial services industry as a whole, a big jump from its place on the 2024 list and a clear indication of the company's unwavering commitment to innovation and excellence.
